generated_exposure.exposure_text: After recent events, it's clear we need stronger domestic security powers to keep up with evolving threats. Numerous attacks on our infrastructure show that waiting for perfect intelligence isn't an option. While some worry about civil liberties, our allies have proven that balanced expansion of security measures actually improves public safety. We can't afford to be reactive anymore - proactive measures save lives. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
